summary: The South Bay funding frenzy continues: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), Rhoda AI (Palo Alto), and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each landed over $400M this month, while SiFive's $400M Series G signals strong investor appetite for chip design. Hiring remains mixed—seven companies are actively expanding while two pull back—suggesting selective optimism. This week brings the STEM Zone expo to Santa Clara and a resilience dialogue at SJSU for those tracking both innovation and community impact.
